changes: Apps: fixed Installed and category filters and cached filter results for faster switching
Displays without a notch now get the full subagent experience: a status gem on the idle pill, an agents row on hover, and the same agent list and chat surface as notched displays
Onboarding: pressing Enter now activates available Continue actions
Unified the floating chat experience across notched and non-notched displays while keeping the compact pill on displays without a notch
Fixed memory labels appearing incorrectly after stale fetches or local cache updates
